rangeV6.description: IPv6 VIP range for the IPAddressPool. Format `<from>-<to>` or `<cidr>`. Bound from §8 k8s_lab_metallb_vip_range_v6. Pattern accepts only hex+colon characters (with optional `-<from>-<to>` range or `/<prefix>` CIDR suffix); a stray IPv4-looking value (contains `.`) is rejected at template stage. The substrate is IPv6-only at the external segment per §4.2 / §5.5; an IPv4 range here would silently mis-train MetalLB to allocate v4 VIPs out of a field named `rangeV6`.

interface.description: Speaker interface for L2 announcements. Bound from §8 k8s_lab_metallb_interface.

extraNodeSelectors.description: Optional matchLabels stacked ON TOP of the substrate-required CP-exclusion nodeSelector. Empty map = any worker eligible.

image.description: Base image for the test driver Pod (kubectl driver). alpine + busybox wget. Memory rule bans bitnami.

demoImage.description: Image for the backend Pod behind the LoadBalancer demo Service. Must listen on IPv6 (default nginx config does — `[::]:80`).

demoName.description: Backend Service / Deployment basename. Lowercase RFC 1123.

kubectlVersion.description: kubectl version fetched from dl.k8s.io inside the test driver Pod.
